name: Week 8 Legs — Selective Push (Quads/Hamstrings/Glutes/Calves)
description: Selective push week. Squat pyramids faster — W7 hit 80x8 clean, so open at 75 and get to 80 sooner. Back extensions stay at 25lb dead slow — hamstrings were torched, this is working. Leg press stays at 4 plates for full ROM (dropped from 6 in W7, way deeper, found hidden muscles). Lunges brutally hard at 40 with the deeper everything — hold steady.

exercises.notes: Full depth. Wake up the legs.
55/side x8. Deep — same depth as working sets.

Pyramid faster: 75x8, 75x8, 80x8, 80x8. W7 actuals: 75x8x3 + 80x8 felt good, almost easy, good ROM. 80 is no longer a test — it's a working weight now. Two sets at 80 this week. Focus on same depth and control at 80 as you had at 75.

25lb plate, dead slow, 2s pause at bottom. W7 actuals: 25x15x3 torched the hamstrings. This feels nothing like RDL — it's working as its own thing. Stay at 25lb, don't rush heavier. Slow eccentric is the stimulus. If it stops feeling hard, go slower before going heavier.
4 plates/side, FULL ROM, lower mount point. W7: dropped from 6 to 4 plates and found way more depth — hidden muscles lit up. Stay at 4 plates. Chase depth, not weight. Don't creep back up to 6.
SINGLE LEG: 4 plates/side x20, other foot stabilizing on the plate. W7 actuals: 4 plates x20 single leg, solid. Stay here.

110, settings 5/5/2. W7 actuals: 110x12x3, hard last 7, dropped to 100 to finish. Stay at 110 — fight for all 12 on every set. If you need to drop to 100 on the last set again, that's fine, but try to hold 110 longer this week.

40lb DBs. W7 actuals: extremely hard — deeper squats + deeper leg press wrecked bracing for lunges. Stay at 40. The deeper everything upstream is the real progression here. Walking lunges, long stride, back knee toward floor.

tips: SELECTIVE PUSH — squat pyramids faster (two sets at 80 instead of one). Everything else holds or refines.
Squat: 75x8, 75x8, 80x8, 80x8. Two sets at 80 is the push this week.
Back extension: 25lb dead slow with 2s pause. Go slower before going heavier.
Leg press: 4 plates FULL ROM. Don't chase weight — depth is the stimulus now.
Leg curl: 110x12 all 3 sets. Fight for every rep before dropping weight.
Lunges: 40lb, survive. The deeper upstream work is making these harder already.
Rest 3 min between squats, 2 min leg press, 90s isolation
